eidolons.name: Inflammable
eidolons.description: When Firefly enters Complete Combustion state, her ATK increases by 30% for 3 turns.

eidolons.name: Self-Combustion
eidolons.description: When Firefly's current HP drops below 50%, she gains 1 extra turn. This effect can only trigger 1 time per battle.

eidolons.name: Cauterization
eidolons.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

eidolons.name: Melting Point
eidolons.description: When Firefly is in Complete Combustion state, her Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 30%.

eidolons.name: Flashover
eidolons.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15. Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

eidolons.name: Super Nova
eidolons.description: When Firefly uses Enhanced Skill, she ignores 20% of enemy DEF. Additionally, if the enemy is Weakness Broken, the damage of Enhanced Skill increases by 50%.
